title: DSIT cyber security newsletter - April 2025
body: "The monthly Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) cyber security newsletter details the latest announcements, events and projects for people interested in the field of cyber security. This month’s edition includes:   New policy statement detailing the Cyber Security and Resilience Bill Launch of the Cyber Governance Code of Practice New statistics published in the Cyber Security Breaches Survey 2025 Cyber Local funding available – apply by 30 April New Cyber Essentials resources available.   You can sign up to receive the newsletter each month directly via email.  To ensure you receive the newsletter in your inbox please mark cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk as one of your contacts.  If you have any questions please email cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk.  Further editions of the newsletter can be found on the cyber security newsletter collection page.  "
